check: Every input has an associated label
why_it_matters: Screen readers announce purpose cognitive accessibility
fix: Use MUI FormControlLabel or TextField label prop with htmlFor

check: Error messages are linked to inputs via aria-describedby
why_it_matters: Screen readers announce errors when focusing input
fix: Use TextField helperText prop which binds via aria-describedby automatically

check: Required fields are indicated visually and via aria-required
why_it_matters: Users know what must be filled before submission
fix: Use TextField required prop and visual indicator

check: Dialog and Drawer trap focus while open
why_it_matters: Keyboard users cannot tab behind open overlays
fix: MUI Dialog and Drawer handle this automatically verify custom implementations

check: Focus returns to trigger after Dialog Drawer closes
why_it_matters: Maintains navigation context for keyboard users
fix: MUI built-in behavior test with keyboard

check: Status is not communicated by color alone
why_it_matters: Colorblind users need icons or text to understand state
fix: Add icon + text in MUI Chip do not use color-only

check: Table headers are marked with proper th scope
why_it_matters: Screen readers can navigate and announce column relationships
fix: Use native table th elements or MUI TableCell component prop

check: Row actions are keyboard accessible and focusable
why_it_matters: All users can trigger actions without a mouse
fix: Use MUI Button or IconButton for row actions

check: Breadcrumbs reflect current location and are navigable
why_it_matters: Wayfinding for all users screen reader context
fix: Implement with nav aria-label current page marked

check: Buttons have descriptive text or aria-label
why_it_matters: Screen reader users understand what action will happen
fix: Avoid icon-only IconButton without aria-label

check: Loading states are announced to assistive technology
why_it_matters: Users know content is being fetched
fix: Use MUI Skeleton with aria-hidden or aria-live regions for dynamic updates

check: Page has exactly one h1 and logical heading hierarchy
why_it_matters: Screen reader users navigate by headings efficiently
fix: Use Typography variant h1 for page title h2 for sections

check: Interactive elements have minimum 44x44px touch target
why_it_matters: Mobile users can tap accurately without mis-taps
fix: Ensure MUI Button and IconButton meet target size

check: Text has minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background
why_it_matters: Low-vision users can read content
fix: Verify with theme token values do not use light gray on white

check: HTML lang attribute matches page language
why_it_matters: Screen readers use correct pronunciation
fix: Set lang in app root or layout

check: Skip links bypass blocks
why_it_matters: Keyboard users need to skip repetitive nav
fix: Add skip-to-content link as first focusable element

check: Focus visible indicators are clearly visible
why_it_matters: Keyboard users need to see where focus is
fix: Ensure focus-visible outline is visible never disable globally

check: Document page title updates on route change
why_it_matters: SPA route changes must update title
fix: Use Next.js metadata or react-helmet for title updates

check: Alt text for images icons
why_it_matters: Decorative vs informative images must be distinguished
fix: Use img alt or aria-label on informative icons hide decorative ones

check: Page has proper landmark regions
why_it_matters: Screen reader users navigate by landmarks
fix: Use main nav aside search landmarks in PageLayout

check: Status messages announced via aria-live
why_it_matters: Toast snackbar announcements not missed by screen readers
fix: Add role status or alert to MUI Snackbar

check: Input autocomplete attributes provided
why_it_matters: Users with cognitive disabilities benefit from autocomplete
fix: Use TextField inputProps autoComplete for passwords emails names

check: Non-text contrast UI components focus rings borders 3:1
why_it_matters: Low-vision users need to see UI boundaries
fix: Ensure focus rings toggle borders slider thumbs meet 3:1 contrast

check: Text reflows at 400 percent zoom
why_it_matters: Users who zoom need content to reflow not scroll horizontally
fix: Test at 320px viewport ensure no horizontal scroll except tables

check: Content on hover focus is dismissible
why_it_matters: Tooltips dropdowns must be dismissible via Escape
fix: Ensure MUI Tooltip Popover dismissible via Escape

check: Error prevention for destructive actions
why_it_matters: Users need confirmation before irreversible actions
fix: Add Dialog confirmation for delete bulk actions

check: Consistent identification labels across pages
why_it_matters: Link purpose and accessible name must match visible label
fix: Ensure Link component text matches aria-label

check: Language of parts for mixed-language content
why_it_matters: Mixed-language content needs correct pronunciation
fix: Use lang attribute on foreign text elements

check: Respect prefers-reduced-motion
why_it_matters: Animations can cause vestibular issues for some users
fix: Wrap transitions in prefers-reduced-motion media query

check: Pointer gesture alternatives
why_it_matters: Drag-to-reorder swipeable drawers need keyboard alternatives
fix: Provide keyboard alternatives for drag gestures
